files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+# JSON Schema Provenance
+
+This directory contains committed JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 contracts for
+operator-facing config and robot/MCP response payloads.
+
+Current status: the robot schemas are committed golden files maintained from
+Rust `serde` types. `crates/frankenterm-core/src/api_schema.rs` documents the
+target direction as Rust structs to JSON Schema via `schemars`, but this repo
+does not currently contain a checked-in regeneration command. Until that
+generator exists, the generator command column records the manual golden update
+path plus the validation test that must pass after edits.
+
+The `Last regenerated version` column is the workspace package version from
+`Cargo.toml` at the time this provenance table was reconciled.
+
+| Schema file | Source of truth | Generator command | Last regenerated version |
+| --- | --- | --- | --- |
+| `ft-config.json` | `crates/frankenterm-core/src/config.rs::Config` plus the README `ft.toml` block mirrored by `crates/frankenterm-core/tests/fixtures/ft_config_readme.toml` | Manual golden update from `Config`/README; verify with `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test conformance_ft_config_schema` | 0.1.0 |
+| `wa-robot-accounts-refresh.json` | `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs::RobotAccountsRefreshData`; client mirror `crates/frankenterm-core/src/robot_types.rs::AccountsRefreshData` | Manual golden update from Rust serde structs; verify with `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test schema_golden` | 0.1.0 |
+| `wa-robot-accounts.json` | `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs::RobotAccountsListData`; client mirror `crates/frankenterm-core/src/robot_types.rs::AccountsListData` | Manual golden update from Rust serde structs; verify with `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test schema_golden` | 0.1.0 |
+| `wa-robot-agents-configure-dry-run.json` | `crates/frankenterm-core/src/robot_types.rs::AgentConfigureDryRunData` emitted by `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs` agent configure dry-run path | Manual golden update from Rust serde structs; verify with `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test schema_golden` | 0.1.0 |
+| `wa-robot-agents-configure.json` | `crates/frankenterm-core/src/robot_types.rs::AgentConfigureData` emitted by `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs` agent configure path | Manual golden update from Rust serde structs; verify with `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test schema_golden` | 0.1.0 |
+| `wa-robot-agents-detect.json` | `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs::RobotAgentsDetectData` and `crates/frankenterm-core/src/robot_types.rs::AgentInventoryData` | Manual golden update from Rust serde structs; verify with `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test schema_golden` | 0.1.0 |
+| `wa-robot-agents-list.json` | `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs::RobotAgentsListData` and `crates/frankenterm-core/src/robot_types.rs::AgentInventoryData` | Manual golden update from Rust serde structs; verify with `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test schema_golden` | 0.1.0 |
+| `wa-robot-agents-running.json` | `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs::RobotAgentsRunningData` and `crates/frankenterm-core/src/robot_types.rs::AgentInventoryData` | Manual golden update from Rust serde structs; verify with `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test schema_golden` | 0.1.0 |
+| `wa-robot-approve.json` | `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs::RobotApproveData`; client mirror `crates/frankenterm-core/src/robot_types.rs::ApproveData` | Manual golden update from Rust serde structs; verify with `cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test schema_golden` | 0.1.0 |
